data.title: Advanced Encryption
data.description: End-to-end encryption ensures that only communicating users can read the messages.
data.technical_spec: Encryption based on the Signal Protocol.

data.title: Two-Step Verification
data.description: An optional feature that adds more security to users' accounts.
data.technical_spec: Requires entering a passcode after the initial account setup.

data.title: Spam Detection
data.description: Automatic detection and prevention systems to limit spam messages and fake accounts.
data.technical_spec: Combines machine learning algorithms with community reports for accuracy.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Continuous security audits are conducted to identify and fix vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Audits include code reviews and pen testing.

data.title: Software Update Alerts
data.description: Ensures users have the latest security patches through frequent app updates.
